title: ReplicationController — Writing a ReplicationController Manifest
text:
As with all other Kubernetes config, a ReplicationController needs
apiVersion
,
kind
, and
metadata
fields.
When the control plane creates new Pods for a ReplicationController, the
.metadata.name
of the
ReplicationController is part of the basis for naming those Pods. The name of a ReplicationController must be a valid
DNS subdomain
value, but this can produce unexpected results for the Pod hostnames. For best compatibility,
the name should follow the more restrictive rules for a
DNS label
.
For general information about working with configuration files, see
object management
.
A ReplicationController also needs a
.spec
section
.
